title: FLEX Q4 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates, Increase Y/Y
text: Flex Ltd FLEX reported fourth-quarter fiscal 2023 adjusted earnings of 57 cents per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 11.8%. The bottom line grew 9.6% year over year.

title: Flex (FLEX) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Flex (FLEX) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.57 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.51 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.52 per share a year ago.

title: Flex Ltd: Robust Growth Potential At A Discounted Valuation
text: Flex's quarterly earnings were strong and demonstrated strong growth going into 2023. Flex has been able to maintain performance with the broader market which displays its ability to effectively allocate resources and expand.
